/usr/bin/cc -g -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mvgal-daemon.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/mvgal-daemon.dir/daemon/main.o" "CMakeFiles/mvgal-daemon.dir/daemon/gpu_manager.o" "CMakeFiles/mvgal-daemon.dir/daemon/config.o" "CMakeFiles/mvgal-daemon.dir/daemon/ipc.o" -o mvgal-daemon   -L/home/axogm/Documents/Driver/new/mvgal/src/userspace/build_userspace  libmvgal_core.a -lThreads::Threads -lm
